title: Get Water Log
description: Retrieves a summary and list of a user's water log entries for a given day.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The date in the format yyyy-MM-dd.

response_fields.name: summary : water
response_fields.description: Total amount of water consumed for the day.

response_fields.name: water : amount
response_fields.description: Amount of water consumed for each period of the day.
